mapper.select:
SELECT bookImg , bookTitle , writer , Publisher , Category , bookContent , publicationDate , registrationDate , bookNumberInfo FROM book WHERE bookNumberInfo = #{bookNumberInfo}
LIMIT 1

SELECT b.bookNumber , b.bookNumberInfo , b.loanAvailable , mi.nameH , l.loanDate , l.dueDate FROM book b LEFT JOIN loan l ON b.bookNumber = l.bookNumber AND l.returnDate IS NULL LEFT JOIN memberinfo mi ON l.memberNo = mi.memberNo WHERE b.bookNumberInfo = #{bookNumberInfo} AND skj_Flg = '0' ORDER BY b.bookNumber ASC
mapper.update: UPDATE book SET skj_Flg = 1 WHERE bookNumberInfo = #{bookNumberInfo}
mapper.select: SELECT MIN(bookNumber) AS bookNumber ,MIN(bookTitle) AS bookTitle ,MIN(writer) AS writer ,MIN(publicationDate) AS publicationDate ,MIN(registrationDate) AS registrationDate , bookNumberInfo FROM book WHERE bookTitle = #{title} AND skj_Flg = '0' GROUP BY bookNumberInfo
mapper.update: UPDATE book SET skj_Flg = 1 WHERE bookNumber = #{bookNumber}
